PhD Diss Repository

This repository contains the following digital material:

Network graphs

  • Network of the dumu-nita en (link)
  • Network of the lugals (link)
  • Network of the maškim (link)

Figures

  • Genealogical diagram of the kings’ family (Plate I) (link)
  • Genealogical diagram of the viziers’ family (Plate II) (link)
  • Hypothetical reconstruction of the kinship relationships referred to (Ego-)Dusigu (link)
  • Genealogical diagram of the Lord Yiqqī’s family (link)
  • The lugals network (static image) (link)
  • The keywords cohesion (static image) (link)
